title: Tribal groups, seeking restrictions on Alaska’s Bering Sea trawlers, get day in court
summary: This article was first published by the Alaska Beacon, and is reprinted here with permission. James Brooks Alaska Beacon U.S. District Court Judge Sharon Gleason heard oral arguments on Sept. 26, 2024, in a lawsuit filed by two of Alaska’s largest tribal groups against federal managers of the state’...

title: Alaska House Speaker’s Comments Raise Concerns Over Voter Disenfranchisement
summary: For Immediate Release – October 11, 2024 Anchorage, AK – The Alaska Federation of Natives (AFN) expresses deep concern following comments made by Alaska House Speaker Cathy Tilton on a radio show that repealing the witness signature requirement would have, “leaned the election towards Mary Peltola, to be quite honest.” These remarks, bring to light troubling implications that member...
